title: Tom Smith Pack 6 Luxury Mini Charity Christmas Crackers Kraft Brown & Red Merry Christmas
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: CHRISTMAS WITH A BANG: These luxury mini crackers are great quality, each contain a special gift like a bottle opener, money clip or puzzle. Pull the cracker on Christmas day to get your gift along with a hat, snap and motto!

TRADITIONAL FESTIVE CHRISTMAS DESIGN: Christmas crackers have been a traditional part of Christmas festivities since their invention by Tom Smith in 1847. These crackers are Kraft Brown & Red in colour with a foliage Christmas Tree design and are hand tied with a red ribbon.

ENJOY A SUSTAINABLE CHRISTMAS: These crackers are made in partnership with the Woodland Trust and have been designed with the environment in mind, crafted without single-use plastic materials, glitter & plastic decorations. Tom Smith are proud to support the Trussell Trust with a donation for every cracker sold aiding food banks in the UK

IDEAL FOR ANY FESTIVE OCCASION: Pack of 6 luxury mini Christmas crackers, can be placed around your Christmas dinner or maybe for a New Years Eve Party! Approx Sizing: Crackers each measure 210 x 45mm

FIT FOR ROYALTY - Tom Smith is still the official supplier of Christmas crackers to the Royal Household. Whatever gift your cracker contains, along with a hat and joke everyone around the dinner table will be in for a royal treat!
description: Christmas crackers have been a traditional part of Christmas festivities. Tom Smith's wonderful creativity resulted in the invention of the Christmas cracker in 1847. Our cracker range covers a wide variety of styles and sizes with new shapes and edges to suit any colour scheme and taste. Tom Smith is still the official supplier of Christmas crackers to the Royal Household. Whether your cracker contains an pencil sharpener or money clip along with a hat and joke everyone around the dinner table will be in for a royal treat! These crackers are made in partnership with the Woodland Trust and have been designed with the environment in mind, crafted without single-use plastic materials, glitter & plastic decorations. Tom Smith are proud to support the Trussell Trust with a donation for every cracker sold aiding food banks in the UK.
